title: Norwegian Toast
description: A simple and hearty breakfast dish inspired by Norwegian cuisine. Crusty bread toasted to perfection and served with a side of buttery goodness.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
2. Slice a piece of bread and place it in the pan.
3. Cook the bread for 2-3 minutes on the first side, until it starts to toast.
4. Flip the bread over and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until it's golden brown.
5. Spread 1-2 tablespoons of butter on top of the toast.
6. Serve the Norwegian toast warm and enjoy!
